calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn For Default Prove Up Hearing And Case Summary
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially appearing for Plaintiff, State Farm General Ins. Co.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Carlos Tabiera.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Declaration of Brenda Stanley admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $36,444.70
Pre-Judgment Interest: $573.18
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $522.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $37,540.38
Judgment signed in open court.
